supersedes: CBW-SITE-PLATFORM-ARCHITECTURE-V2-001 (interrupted mid-flight by owner; its 5 uncommitted draft files remain untouched in C:\projects\CryptoBonusWorld-architecture-v2 awaiting owner disposition)

summary.product: global multi-country multi-language availability- and bonus-intelligence platform; independent country (facts) / language (presentation) / visual (country identity) axes
summary.countryVisual: CountryVisualProfile per country; one flat-vector art style; textless/evergreen/promo-free/bonus-free/date-free artwork; flags glyph-only; emblems require rights review; masthead system; owner-gated generation + export; pilots defined (KZ, PL, DE) but not generated; one profile per country serves all language siblings (LOCALE14) — never per-language artwork
summary.localeSystem: country != language; explicit extensible MarketLanguageMatrix (KZ: ru*/kk/en, PL: pl*/uk/ru/en, DE: de*/en; * = marketDefault & xDefaultTarget; English = fallback only, never assumed default; kk never kz, uk never ua; extensible without URL-model change, no Cartesian product) + per-page PageLocaleCoverage (PLANNED->LIVE) gating switchers/hreflang/sitemap; country-switch fallback order language->marketDefault->English->resolver with mandatory visible notice; no IP/browser hard redirects
summary.seo: stable Latin slugs; self-canonical siblings; reciprocal regional hreflang (ru-KZ/kk-KZ/en-KZ/pl-PL/uk-PL/ru-PL/en-PL/de-DE/en-DE; bare codes forbidden on market pages); x-default -> LIVE market-default sibling (/kz/ru/, /pl/pl/, /de/de/); LIVE-only allowlist sitemap; SEO01-SEO15 + LOCALE01-LOCALE25
summary.region: RegionResolver (URL→manual→saved→IP→global) + RegionAvailabilityModule (renderer, owns no facts) + 8-link offer gate chain; MI canonical via read-only adapters; affiliate registry = implementation facts only; affiliateInfluencesRanking=false
summary.delivery: Owner → ChatGPT shaping → Claude Code implementation → owner GO commit/push → PR → Actions gate matrix → fix loop → ChatGPT review → owner approval → merge → separate production gates → deploy → live QA; reference images via owner-assets + REFERENCE_MANIFEST.json, never public/**
summary.governance: CI gate matrix per PR class; QA-1…QA-6 release gates; versioned visual-regression baselines; CBW_CURRENT_PROJECT_STATE.{md,json} status system with exact schema; 12 owner-decision gate types, default-deny
summary.urlModel: market-first × language-second: /{countrySlugLower}/{languageCodeLower}/… (e.g. /kz/ru/, /kz/kk/, /kz/en/, /pl/pl/, /pl/en/, /de/de/, /de/en/); Kazakh = kk (never /kz/kz/); language-first model rejected (recorded in SEO doc rejectedPatterns); market root = market homepage (no /kz/{lang}/countries/kazakhstan/ duplicate); market exchange page fulfills the pair intent

rolloutOrder: W3 Country/market root + RegionAvailabilityModule + CountryVisualProfile pilots (KZ/PL/DE)
W5 Market exchange pages (pair intent) — needs MI pilot data
W7 Locale infrastructure + Kazakhstan pairs (/kz/ru/, /kz/kk/, /kz/en/; default ru)
W8 Poland pairs (/pl/pl/, /pl/uk/, /pl/ru/, /pl/en/; default pl) + Germany pairs (/de/de/, /de/en/; default de) + RTL audit
W9 Production migration waves per family (separately authorized)
committedCommitShaMeaning: the initial architecture-content commit (the later lifecycle-reconciliation commit is a separate follow-up commit on the same branch)
